eventStreams.name: PayrollTransactions
kqlAggregations: PayrollTransactionEvents | summarize TotalAmount=sum(Amount), TxnCount=count() by TransactionType, bin(Timestamp, 1h)
PayrollTransactionEvents | summarize AvgPay=avg(Amount) by PayCodeID, bin(Timestamp, 1d)

eventStreams.name: JournalPostings
kqlAggregations: JournalPostingEvents | summarize TotalDebits=sum(DebitAmount), TotalCredits=sum(CreditAmount) by PostingType, bin(Timestamp, 1h)

eventStreams.name: HRSystemEvents
eventStreams.description: HR system audit events (logins, record changes, approvals)
kqlAggregations: HRSystemAuditEvents | summarize EventCount=count() by EventType, Action, bin(Timestamp, 1h)

bridgeQueries.name: PayrollBridge
bridgeQueries.description: Bridge real-time payroll with Lakehouse payroll fact

bridgeQueries.name: JournalBridge
bridgeQueries.description: Bridge real-time journal postings with GL fact
